name: Unity Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank offering personal and business checking, savings, CDs, mortgages, auto loans, and merchant services through Clover POS integration.
description_long: Unity Bank is a community-focused FDIC-insured bank that positions itself as a cornerstone of local economic growth. The bank serves both personal and business customers with traditional banking products and modern financial technology partnerships. On the personal side, they offer checking accounts, savings accounts, CDs (currently advertising 6-month at 3.75% APY and 11-month at 3.50% APY), auto loans, and mortgage services. For business customers, Unity Bank provides business checking accounts with promotional rates, high-yield savings options, business loan products, and has partnered with Clover—described as the largest U.S. cloud-based point-of-sale platform—to offer comprehensive merchant services. This partnership allows small business owners to accept multiple payment types (EMV, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay), manage inventory and payroll, run loyalty programs, and access Clover Capital for working capital financing. Unity Bank emphasizes security, accessibility (AudioEye-enabled website), customer service (800-618-2265 support line), and financial education through their online education center. The bank is part of Unity Bancorp, which has been recognized by Piper Sandler as a top community bank and was named to the Piper Sandler Sm-All Stars Class of 2025. They maintain physical branch locations with posted hours and offer online account opening for certain products like CDs. The company has recently reported strong quarterly earnings of $15.5 million, indicating solid financial health. Their approach emphasizes personal service typical of community banking while integrating modern fintech solutions for business customers.
services: Business checking accounts with promotional rates
Certificates of deposit (CDs) with online opening
Clover merchant services and point-of-sale platform
Financial education and online learning center
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Competitive CD rates advertised (6-month CD at 3.75% APY, 11-month at 3.50% APY)
Comprehensive merchant services through Clover POS integration with no fixed payment terms or interest on Clover Capital
Accessible website with AudioEye optimization and multiple accessibility options
Online account opening available for select products (CDs)
Free financial education through online education center for personal and business customers
Local community bank approach with physical branch locations and dedicated customer service line
cons: Website content does not clearly display specific checking account fees, minimum balance requirements, or overdraft charges
Limited information about personal loan products—primarily emphasizes business and mortgage lending
No comparison tools or rate calculators visible on homepage for savings products
Merchant services offering (Clover) is a partnership rather than proprietary product, limiting direct control over features
Website does not prominently feature mobile app features or digital banking capabilities beyond online login
best_for: Small business owners in restaurants, retail, and service industries seeking integrated POS and banking solutions
Savers and CD investors seeking competitive fixed-rate products from a stable FDIC-insured institution
Business customers needing merchant services, payroll management, inventory tracking, and working capital financing in one platform
Community-oriented customers preferring local banking relationships and personal service over large national banks
diagnosis: Unity Bank is best suited for small business owners and savers in communities they serve who value integrated banking and merchant services with a personal touch. The main caveat is that detailed fee structures and specific account requirements are not clearly disclosed on the website, requiring direct contact with the bank for complete information before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
